brandName.usage: Used for the SC4LE wordmark and brand identifiers.

headings.description: Headings must be modern, minimal, and geometric, reflecting the SC4LE spiral aesthetic.

subheadings.description: Subheadings provide hierarchy and clarity without visual noise.

body.description: Body text must prioritise readability and cognitive ease.

numerical.description: Used for data, metrics, and structured information.

accessibility.notes: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements when placed on SC4LE brand colours.
